metadata.description: Prompt engineering marketplace with multi-agent convergence pipeline. 16 techniques, 64 models, autonomous perfection.

plugins.name: prompt-crafter
plugins.description: Creates production-ready prompts with technique selection, model fitting, and multi-agent convergence pipeline.

plugins.name: prompt-refiner
plugins.description: Improves existing prompts with diagnosis, convergence engine, and multi-agent review.

plugins.name: convergence-engine
plugins.description: Standalone prompt optimizer. Iterates up to 100 times with multi-agent review. Use on any prompt.
